evidence: Zo is perfect for non-technical users. V described his own "aha" moments where Zo enabled him to build things he previously needed engineers for, surpassing tools like Cursor or Lovable.
V demoed his own automated meeting processing system in Zo (Fireflies integration, JSON transformation, custom recaps, and automated double opt-in intro emails).
V showed an enrichment report he ran on Eric earlier, demonstrating Zo's ability to pull deep context on individuals (including Eric's hobbies like knitting).
Eric described his current manual tasks: Sunday inbox "look back" (ensuring responsiveness).
Alec is in San Francisco and planning a sailing trip to the British Virgin Islands in January.
Victor shared he's based in Wake Forest, NC (outside Raleigh) after 15 years in San Francisco. V noted the rarity of VCs outside traditional hubs (SF, NYC, Miami).
